API docs by Redocly

SafePass Client Apps API (Visitor Management + Mapping) (1.0.0)

Download OpenAPI specification:

SafePass Platform: jonathan.sargent@safepass.com License: LicenseRef-Proprietary

Subset of the SafePass API covering the operations the Visitor Management and Mapping client apps perform.

A focused subset of the SafePass API contract containing only the operations the Visitor Management and Mapping apps perform. Administration, kiosk, and other internal surfaces are excluded. Each path carries an x-apps marker: visitor (Visitor Management), mapping (Mapping), or shared (both apps). Response shapes explicitly marked PROVISIONAL (the metrics group, the auth scope/one-time-code group, and the scope tree) will be frozen before build start; all other shapes are stable and live.

Auth

Principal resolution (whoami), permission-scope introspection, and one-time-code re-verification (shapes provisional).

Resolve the authenticated principal

Returns the authenticated principal (a Cognito user or an org-scoped API token) and its resolved org scope, scope identity, and effective permissions. Response uses the { data } envelope.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/whoami

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": {
    • "user_id": "user_01H9...",
    • "email": "user@example.com",
    • "principal": "user",
    • "org_ids": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "membership_org_ids": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "assignments": [
      • { }
      ],
    • "scope_identity": { },
    • "scope_label": "string",
    • "scope_class": "string",
    • "effective_permissions": { },
    • "membership_version": "string",
    • "evaluated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    }
}

List the authorization scope catalog

Returns the scope/permission catalog used to build grants. Response shape is PROVISIONAL.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/auth/scopes

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": { }
}

Request an OTP code

Request a one-time passcode (email-only for now) for an OTP-gated org/user. Request and response shapes are PROVISIONAL.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
Request Body schema: application/json
optional
email
string <email>
property name*
additional property
any

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/auth/otp/request

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "email": "user@example.com"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{ }

Verify an OTP code

Verify a one-time passcode and obtain an otp_session (sent on subsequent requests via X-Otp-Session or Authorization: Bearer otp:<session>). Request and response shapes are PROVISIONAL.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
Request Body schema: application/json
required
code
string
property name*
additional property
any

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/auth/otp/verify

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "code": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "otp_session": "string"
}

Organizations

Organization scope tree for scope pickers.

Get the org scope tree

Nested organization -> divisions -> locations -> buildings -> zones tree for scope pickers. Response shape is PROVISIONAL pending confirmation of the hierarchy entities' wire serialization.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
path Parameters
orgID
required
string

Organization id.

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/orgs/{orgID}/scope-tree

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": { }
}

Media

Pre-signed media uploads (visitor photos, floorplan images).

Request a pre-signed media upload

Returns a media_id + pre-signed upload_url. PUT the bytes to that URL with the returned headers, then call the complete endpoint.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
Request Body schema: application/json
required
asset_type
required
string

Logical asset class (e.g. visitor_photo, company_logo, badge_template_asset).

content_type
required
string

MIME type of the file to be uploaded (e.g. image/jpeg).

org_id
string

Organization to own the asset (may be inferred from the principal).

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/media/uploads

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "asset_type": "string",
  • "content_type": "string",
  • "org_id": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": {
    • "media_id": "string",
    • "upload_url": "http://example.com",
    • "headers": {
      • "property1": "string",
      • "property2": "string"
      },
    • "expires_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    }
}

Mark a media upload complete

Call after the client PUTs the bytes to the presigned URL; promotes the asset to READY.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
path Parameters
mediaID
required
string

The media_id returned by the upload request.

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/media/uploads/{mediaID}/complete

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": {
    • "id": "string",
    • "org_id": "string",
    • "owner_user_id": "string",
    • "asset_type": "string",
    • "status": "string",
    • "content_type": "string",
    • "url": "http://example.com",
    • "expires_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    }
}

Get a media asset

Fetch a media asset record, including a signed url once READY.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
path Parameters
mediaID
required
string

Media asset id.

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/media/{mediaID}

  • 401
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{

    • "org_id": "string",
    • "owner_user_id": "string",
    • "asset_type": "string",
    • "status": "string",

Users

The signed-in user's own profile, avatar, and settings.

Get the current user

The authenticated principal's own user record.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/users/me

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": {
    • "id": "string",
    • "organization_id": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "division_ids": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "location_ids": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "email": "user@example.com",
    • "first_name": "string",
    • "last_name": "string",
    • "avatar_media_id": "string",
    • "avatar_url": "string",
    • "roles": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "otp_required": true,
    • "phone": "string",

    • "recoverable_until": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",

    • "retention_override_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "scope_identity": { },
    • "version": 0,
    • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    }
}

Org Hierarchy

Divisions, locations, buildings (read-only in these apps).

cognitoBearer
path Parameters
orgID
required
string

Devices

Read-only device and station state (badges, readers, stations) for status displays and station selection.

List devices

Keyset-paginated, server-sorted list of registered devices. name is a free-text match across label/model/mac/serial/rfid/type/status/state.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
query Parameters
org_id
string

Scope to an organization.

limit
integer [ 1 .. 200 ]
Default: 50

Page size. Default 50, max 200. Out of range -> 400 invalid_limit.

cursor
string

Opaque pagination cursor, bound to the active sort. Omit on the first page. A cursor minted under a different sort -> 400 cursor_sort_mismatch; malformed -> 400 invalid_cursor. Do not introspect.

sort
string

col for ASC, -col for DESC. The id ASC tie-breaker is appended server-side; clients must not include it. Unknown column -> 400 invalid_sort.

include_count
string
Enum: "1" "approximate"

Opt in to meta.total_count. 1 returns the exact COUNT(*). approximate is reserved and currently -> 400 count_approximate_not_implemented.

name
string

Free-text match across label/model/mac/serial/rfid/type/status/state.

type
string

Comma-separated device type filter (IN-list).

status
string
division_id
string
location_id
string
building_id
string
zone_id
string
station_id
string
expand
string

Comma-separated: stats (reader rolling swipe counts).

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/devices

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "string",
      • "org_id": "string",
      • "label": "string",
      • "model": "string",
      • "mac_id": "string",
      • "serial": "string",
      • "rfid": "string",
      • "type": "string",
      • "status": "string",
      • "state_code": 0,
      • "state_label": "string",
      • "state": "string",
      • "in_dock": true,
      • "battery_pct": 0,
      • "battery_volt": 0,
      • "battery_low": true,
      • "charging": true,
      • "thing_name": "string",
      • "thing_group": "string",
      • "thing_groups": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "firmware_version": "string",
      • "cert_id": "string",
      • "secret_arn": "string",
      • "shadow_cache": { },
      • "last_seen_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "shadow_refreshed_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "conn_status": true,
      • "conn_disconnect_reason": "string",
      • "conn_last_connected_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "conn_last_disconnected_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "provisioning_id": "string",
      • "provisioning_required": true,
      • "division_id": "string",
      • "location_id": "string",
      • "building_id": "string",
      • "zone_id": "string",
      • "station_id": "string",
      • "meta": { },
      • "version": 0,
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "geofence_status": {
        • "inside_features": [
          • {
            • "floor_id": "string",
            • "geofence_id": "string",
            • "feature_id": "string",
            • "name": "string",
            • "rating": "string"
            }
          ],
        • "observed_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
        },
      • "stats": {
        • "swipes_last_1h": 0,
        • "swipes_last_24h": 0,
        • "swipes_last_7d": 0
        }
      }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "cursor": "string",
    • "sort": "-updated_at,id",
    • "limit": 50,
    • "total_count": 0
    },
  • "links": {
    • "self": "string"
    },
  • "includes": { }
}

Get a device

Fetch a single device. Returns ETag (device version) for optimistic concurrency on PATCH.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string

Device id.

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/devices/{id}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": {
    • "id": "string",

    • "conn_last_disconnected_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "provisioning_id": "string",
    • "provisioning_required": true,
    • "division_id": "string",
    • "location_id": "string",
    • "building_id": "string",
    • "zone_id": "string",
    • "station_id": "string",
    • "meta": { },
    • "version": 0,
    • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "geofence_status": {
      • "inside_features": [
        • {
          • "floor_id": "string",
          • "geofence_id": "string",
          • "feature_id": "string",
          • "name": "string",
          • "rating": "string"
          }
        ],
      • "observed_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      },
    • "stats": {
      • "swipes_last_1h": 0,
      • "swipes_last_24h": 0,
      • "swipes_last_7d": 0
      }
    }
}

List stations

Check-in stations for an org, filtered to the caller's scope (front_desk+). Front-desk clients use this to pick the operating station: station_id on check-in/preflight scopes badge-pool selection to that station's badges (or unassigned ones).

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
path Parameters
orgID
required
string

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/orgs/{orgID}/stations

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "string",
      • "organization_id": "string",
      • "location_id": "string",
      • "building_id": "string",
      • "name": "string",
      • "kind": "string",
      • "station_code": "string",
      • "status": "string",
      • "meta": { },
      • "version": 0,
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ]
}

Get a device's latest tracking solve

Most recent position solve for the device. Response shape is PROVISIONAL — to be tightened against the tracking model.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string

Device id.

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/devices/{id}/tracking/latest

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": { }
}

Visitors

Visitor records (org-scoped), photos, and face enrollment.

List visitors

Keyset-paginated, server-sorted list of visitors for an org. Follows the shared Pagination & Sort Contract. Each item's host_contact is hydrated from the live host_contacts row when linked.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
query Parameters
org_id
required
string

Organization to scope the list to.

limit
integer [ 1 .. 200 ]
Default: 50

Page size. Default 50, max 200. Out of range -> 400 invalid_limit.

cursor
string

Opaque pagination cursor, bound to the active sort. Omit on the first page. A cursor minted under a different sort -> 400 cursor_sort_mismatch; malformed -> 400 invalid_cursor. Do not introspect.

sort
string

Default -updated_at. Allowed: created_at, updated_at, first_name, last_name, reviewed_at, company.

include_count
string
Enum: "1" "approximate"

Opt in to meta.total_count. 1 returns the exact COUNT(*). approximate is reserved and currently -> 400 count_approximate_not_implemented.

status
string

Comma-separated status filter (IN-list).

name
string

ILIKE across first_name / last_name / email.

type
string

Comma-separated visitor type (IN-list).

company
string

Exact case-insensitive match (comma-separated for IN-list); use company_match=like for substring.

company_match
string
Enum: "exact" "like"

exact (default) or like (ILIKE substring).

include_deleted
boolean
reviewer_id
string
reviewed_after
string <date-time>
reviewed_before
string <date-time>
has_active_breach
boolean

Visitors whose active visit is breached. Gated by GEOFENCE_DETECTION_ENABLED.

ever_breached
boolean

Visitors with at least one historical breached visit.

expand
string

Comma-separated: company_logo, host_contact, geofence_status, geofence_stats.

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/visitors

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "string",
      • "organization_id": "string",
      • "first_name": "string",
      • "last_name": "string",
      • "email": "user@example.com",
      • "phone": "string",
      • "status": "string",
      • "type": "string",
      • "notes": "string",
      • "employee_id": "string",
      • "photo_media_id": "string",
      • "photo_url": "string",
      • "has_face_id": true,
      • "reviewer_id": "string",
      • "review_comment": "string",
      • "reviewed_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "company": "string",
      • "company_address": "string",
      • "company_logo_media_id": "string",
      • "company_logo_url": "string",
      • "host_type": "none",
      • "host_user_id": "string",
      • "host_contact_id": "string",
      • "host_contact": {
        • "name": "string",
        • "first_name": "string",
        • "last_name": "string",
        • "email": "user@example.com",
        • "phone": "string",
        • "country_code": "string",
        • "notify_via": "email",
        • "notify_on_checkin": true,
        • "company": "string",
        • "company_address": "string",
        • "company_logo_media_id": "string",
        • "host_user_id": "string",
        • "dedupe_mode": "conflict_on_diff",
        • "meta": { }
        },
      • "version": 0,
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "deleted_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "delete_reason": "string",
      • "meta": { },
      • "geofence_summary": {
        • "current_severity": "",
        • "current_visit_breached": true,
        • "lifetime_visits_with_breach": 0
        },
      • "geofence_status": {
        • "inside_features": [
          • {
            • "geofence_id": "string",
            • "feature_id": "string",
            • "name": "string",
            • "rating": "string"
            }
          ],
        • "observed_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
        },
      • "geofence_stats": {
        • "lifetime_breach_events": 0,
        • "lifetime_visits_with_breach": 0,
        • "last_breach_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
        }
      }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "cursor": "string",
    • "sort": "-updated_at,id",
    • "limit": 50,
    • "total_count": 0
    },
  • "links": {
    • "self": "string"
    },
  • "includes": { }
}

Create a visitor

Create (or non-blockingly reuse) a visitor. Identity resolution can reuse a faceless existing record (200) or create + queue a merge candidate (201). See api-spec.md for the three response branches and reuse-patch policy. Idempotency-Key supported.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>

UUID to make the create idempotent across retries.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
organization_id
required
string

Note the asymmetry — body uses organization_id; list/get query uses org_id.

first_name
required
string
last_name
required
string
email
string <email>
phone
string
country_code
string

Composed with phone into E.164 server-side.

status
string
type
string

Legacy alias of visitor_type.

visitor_type
string

Canonical visitor type; validated against the org list when enabled.

notes
string
employee_id
string
picture_url
string <uri>
photo_media_id
string
company
string
company_address
string
company_logo_media_id
string
company_logo_url
string <uri>
host_type
string
Enum: "none" "safepass" "contact"
host_user_id
string
object (HostContact)

Inline host-contact payload (dto.HostContactIn). Used both as a nested write body on visitor create/patch and as the hydrated host block on responses. Requires email or phone when provided as a write.

reviewer_id
string
review_comment
string
reviewed_at
string <date-time>
object

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/visitors

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "organization_id": "string",
  • "first_name": "string",
  • "last_name": "string",

  • "phone": "string",
  • "country_code": "string",

  • "type": "string",

  • "company_logo_url": "http://example.com",

    • "name": "string",

    • "meta": { }
    },
  • "reviewer_id": "string",
  • "review_comment": "string",
  • "reviewed_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "meta": { }
}

Bulk-import visitors from CSV

Multipart CSV upload (field file). Per-row hooks: visitor-type validation, E.164 phone composition, picture/logo URL fetch (non-fatal), host-contact upsert. Picture/logo failures land in rows[].warnings. See api-spec.md for the canonical column set and aliases. Min role: location_admin.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
query Parameters
org_id
required
string
header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
required
string <uuid>

UUID — required for bulk import.

Request Body schema: multipart/form-data
required
file
required
string <binary>

CSV with the canonical visitor columns.

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/visitors/bulk

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "total": 0,
  • "success": 0,
  • "rejected": 0,
  • "rows": [
    • {
      • "row": 0,
      • "status": "string",
      • "error": "string",
      • "info": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "warnings": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "id": "string"
      }
    ]
}

Download the visitor bulk-import CSV template

Returns a CSV with the canonical column headers and one example row keyed off the org's first effective visitor type. The X-Visitor-Types response header echoes the effective list. Min role: location_admin.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
query Parameters
org_id
required
string

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/visitors/bulk/template

Response samples

  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "title": "Unauthorized",
  • "status": 401,
  • "detail": "Authentication required.",
  • "code": "UNAUTHORIZED"
}

Get a visitor

Fetch a single visitor. Returns ETag (the visitor version) for optimistic concurrency on PATCH.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string

Visitor id.

query Parameters
expand
string

Comma-separated: company_logo, host_contact, geofence_status, geofence_stats.

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/visitors/{id}

  • 404

      • "last_breach_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    }
}

Update a visitor

Partial update. Supports an inline host_contact upsert (requires email or phone) and company_logo_url ingestion. Pass If-Match with the visitor's current version for optimistic concurrency.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string

Visitor id.

header Parameters
If-Match
string

Visitor version (ETag) for optimistic concurrency.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
organization_id
string

Note the asymmetry — body uses organization_id; list/get query uses org_id.

first_name
string
last_name
string
email
string <email>
phone
string
country_code
string

Composed with phone into E.164 server-side.

status
string
type
string

Legacy alias of visitor_type.

visitor_type
string

Canonical visitor type; validated against the org list when enabled.

notes
string
employee_id
string
picture_url
string <uri>
photo_media_id
string
company
string
company_address
string
company_logo_media_id
string
company_logo_url
string <uri>
host_type
string
Enum: "none" "safepass" "contact"
host_user_id
string
object (HostContact)

Inline host-contact payload (dto.HostContactIn). Used both as a nested write body on visitor create/patch and as the hydrated host block on responses. Requires email or phone when provided as a write.

reviewer_id
string
review_comment
string
reviewed_at
string <date-time>
object

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/visitors/{id}

Soft-delete a visitor

Soft delete. Deleted visitors are treated as not-found in identify/check-in lookups. Min role: location_admin.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string

Visitor id.

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/visitors/{id}

Response samples

  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "title": "Unauthorized",
  • "status": 401,
  • "detail": "Authentication required.",
  • "code": "UNAUTHORIZED"
}

List a visitor's photos

Photo-history rows for the visitor (active + superseded).

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string

Visitor id.

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/visitors/{id}/photos

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "string",
      • "media_id": "string",
      • "media_url": "string",
      • "face_id": "string",
      • "source": "string",
      • "active": true,
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ]
}

Attach a visitor photo

Attach a READY media asset as a visitor photo and (best-effort) index the face. Quality filter is bypassed on first photo / retry-after-failed-index.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string

Visitor id.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
media_id
required
string

A READY media asset in the visitor's org.

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/visitors/{id}/photos

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "media_id": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": {
    • "id": "string",
    • "media_id": "string",
    • "media_url": "string",
    • "face_id": "string",
    • "source": "string",
    • "active": true,
    • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    }
}

Retry face indexing for a visitor

Admin/tuning surface to re-run Rekognition indexing with a (better) photo, bypassing the quality filter by default. Use when initial indexing produced an empty face_id. Idempotent-ish — repeated calls with the same media are safe. Min role: location_admin. Returns ETag (new visitor version).

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string

Visitor id.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
media_id
required
string

A READY media asset in the visitor's org (from the upload flow).

force
boolean
Default: true

Bypass Rekognition's brightness/sharpness quality filter (default true — this endpoint exists to defeat silent quality rejects). Set false only to verify parity with the kiosk path.

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/visitors/{id}/face-reindex

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "media_id": "string",
  • "force": true
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": {
    • "face_id": "string",
    • "force": true,
    • "assessment": {
      • "face_count": 0,
      • "has_face": true,
      • "multiple_faces": true,
      • "brightness": 0,
      • "sharpness": 0,
      • "quality_score": 0,
      • "quality_pass": true,
      • "min_brightness": 0,
      • "min_sharpness": 0
      }
    }
}

Visits

Visit lifecycle — scheduling, check-in/out, badge assignment, and events.

Pre-flight a visitor check-in

Non-mutating gate check for a front-desk check-in. Validates org/location/ building scope and runs the same blockers as submit (in-progress / already checked-in, review required, availability, queue capacity, badge availability) WITHOUT creating a visit. Use it to drive the Check-In button state. A 200 means the gates currently pass — it is not a reservation.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string

Visitor id.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
org_id
string

Defaults to the visitor's organization; must match it if provided.

location_id
required
string
building_id
required
string

Required for check-in.

station_id
string

Optional kiosk/desk station; scopes badge availability.

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/visitors/{id}/checkin/preflight

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "org_id": "string",
  • "location_id": "string",
  • "building_id": "string",
  • "station_id": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 409
  • 428
  • 429
  • 500
  • 503
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": {
    • "ok": true,
    • "org_id": "string",
    • "location_id": "string",
    • "building_id": "string",
    • "queued": 0,
    • "in_progress": 0
    }
}

Check in a visitor

One-call front-desk check-in for a selected visitor. The server consumes the visitor's closest matchable scheduled visit if one exists, otherwise creates an ad-hoc visit, runs the check-in gates, optionally attaches a photo, and enqueues the badge render/encode pipeline. Returns 202 with the queued visit; progress is async via the visit's checkin_status. A matched scheduled visit keeps its pre-arranged host, so host_* fields apply only to the ad-hoc fallback path. Idempotency-Key is REQUIRED.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string

Visitor id.

header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
required
string

Idempotency key; required so retries are safe.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
org_id
string

Defaults to the visitor's organization; must match it if provided.

location_id
required
string
building_id
required
string

Required for check-in.

station_id
string

Optional kiosk/desk station; scopes badge selection.

badge_id
string

Optional explicit badge to assign; otherwise auto-selected.

photo_media_id
string

Optional check-in photo (a completed media upload id) for badge rendering and face indexing.

host_user_id
string

Ad-hoc path only — resolve the host to an existing org user.

host_contact_id
string

Ad-hoc path only — link an existing host contact by id.

object (HostContact)

Inline host-contact payload (dto.HostContactIn). Used both as a nested write body on visitor create/patch and as the hydrated host block on responses. Requires email or phone when provided as a write.

host_notify_via
string

Override the host notification channel for this visit.

host_notify_on_checkin
boolean

Override whether the host is notified on check-in.

check_cleared
boolean

Stub background-check override; sets bg_check_cleared on the visit.

object

Free-form metadata; checkin_source defaults to desk.

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/visitors/{id}/checkin

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "org_id": "string",
  • "location_id": "string",
  • "building_id": "string",
  • "station_id": "string",
  • "badge_id": "string",
  • "photo_media_id": "string",
  • "host_user_id": "string",
  • "host_contact_id": "string",
  • "host_contact": {
    • "name": "string",
    • "first_name": "string",
    • "last_name": "string",
    • "email": "user@example.com",
    • "phone": "string",
    • "country_code": "string",
    • "notify_via": "email",
    • "notify_on_checkin": true,
    • "company": "string",
    • "company_address": "string",
    • "company_logo_media_id": "string",
    • "host_user_id": "string",
    • "dedupe_mode": "conflict_on_diff",
    • "meta": { }
    },
  • "host_notify_via": "string",
  • "host_notify_on_checkin": true,
  • "check_cleared": true,
  • "meta": { }
}

      • "tracking_enabled": true,
      • "allowed_types": [
        • "string"

      },

    • "meta": { },

    • "check_out_requested_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "checked_out_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "station_id": "string",
    • "checked_in_at_station_id": "string",
    • "checked_out_at_station_id": "string",
    • "geofence_status": {
      • "inside_features": [
        • {
          • "floor_id": "string",
          • "geofence_id": "string",
          • "feature_id": "string",
          • "name": "string",
          • "rating": "string"
          }
        ],
      • "observed_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      },
    • "current_floor_id": "string"
    }
}

List a visitor's scheduled visits for check-in

Keyset-paginated list of a single visitor's matchable scheduled visits at a location — used by the front desk to pick which scheduled visit to check the visitor into. org_id, location_id, and visitor_id are all required: this is a per-visitor lookup, not a global arrivals feed.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
query Parameters
org_id
required
string
location_id
required
string
visitor_id
required
string
building_id
string

Optional building filter; 404 BUILDING_NOT_FOUND if it does not belong to the location.

limit
integer [ 1 .. 200 ]
Default: 50

Page size. Default 50, max 200. Out of range -> 400 invalid_limit.

cursor
string

Opaque pagination cursor, bound to the active sort. Omit on the first page. A cursor minted under a different sort -> 400 cursor_sort_mismatch; malformed -> 400 invalid_cursor. Do not introspect.

sort
string

col for ASC, -col for DESC. The id ASC tie-breaker is appended server-side; clients must not include it. Unknown column -> 400 invalid_sort.

include_count
string
Enum: "1" "approximate"

Opt in to meta.total_count. 1 returns the exact COUNT(*). approximate is reserved and currently -> 400 count_approximate_not_implemented.

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/checkin/scheduled

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 503

application/json

      • "checked_in_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "check_out_requested_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "checked_out_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "station_id": "string",
      • "checked_in_at_station_id": "string",
      • "checked_out_at_station_id": "string",
      • "geofence_status": {
        • "inside_features": [
          • {
            • "floor_id": "string",
            • "geofence_id": "string",
            • "feature_id": "string",
            • "name": "string",

      }

  • "meta": {
    • "cursor": "string",
    • "sort": "-updated_at,id",
    • "limit": 50,
    • "total_count": 0
    },
  • "links": {
    • "self": "string"
    },
  • "includes": { }
}

List visits

Keyset-paginated, server-sorted list of visits for an org. See api-spec.md for the full filter set.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
query Parameters
org_id
required
string
limit
integer [ 1 .. 200 ]
Default: 50

Page size. Default 50, max 200. Out of range -> 400 invalid_limit.

cursor
string

Opaque pagination cursor, bound to the active sort. Omit on the first page. A cursor minted under a different sort -> 400 cursor_sort_mismatch; malformed -> 400 invalid_cursor. Do not introspect.

sort
string

col for ASC, -col for DESC. The id ASC tie-breaker is appended server-side; clients must not include it. Unknown column -> 400 invalid_sort.

include_count
string
Enum: "1" "approximate"

Opt in to meta.total_count. 1 returns the exact COUNT(*). approximate is reserved and currently -> 400 count_approximate_not_implemented.

status
string

Comma-separated visit status filter (IN-list).

location_id
string
building_id
string
visitor_id
string

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/visits

Create a visit

Create a scheduled/walk-up visit record. Link an existing visitor via visitor_id, or supply visitor_name for an unlinked record. Idempotency-Key supported.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
organization_id
required
string
location_id
required
string
building_id
string
location_name
string
visitor_id
string

Link to an existing visitor; omit for an unlinked/walk-up visit.

visitor_name
string
vendor_id
string
visitor_type
string
host_user_id
string
host_contact_id
string
host_notify_via
string
Enum: "email" "sms" "both"
host_notify_on_checkin
boolean
object (HostContact)

Inline host-contact payload (dto.HostContactIn). Used both as a nested write body on visitor create/patch and as the hydrated host block on responses. Requires email or phone when provided as a write.

start_time
string <date-time>
end_time
string <date-time>
object

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/visits

}

Get a visit

Fetch a single visit, including live geofence_status, resolved current_floor_id, badge URLs, and check-in worker sub-state.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string

Visit id.

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/visits/{id}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": {
    • "id": "string",
    • "organization_id": "string",
    • "location_id": "string",
    • "building_id": "string",
    • "location_name": "string",
    • "visitor_id": "string",
    • "visitor_name": "string",
    • "vendor_id": "string",
    • "visitor_type": "string",
    • "host_user_id": "string",
    • "host_notify_via": "email",
    • "host_notify_on_checkin": true,
    • "host_contact": {
      • "name": "string",
      • "first_name": "string",
      • "last_name": "string",
      • "email": "user@example.com",

Assign a badge to a visit

Assign a badge device (and optional template) to the visit; triggers badge render.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string

Visit id.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
badge_id
required
string

Device id of the badge to assign.

template_id
string

Optional badge template override for rendering.

Responses

Production

optional

object

    }

List a visit's timeline events

Keyset-paginated visit timeline (device.status, check-in transitions, geofence transitions, etc.). This endpoint disallows ?include_count (count-not-supported). Optional ?type= filters to a single event type.

Event types include the lifecycle transitions plus the geofence detection pair (emitted by runGeofenceDetection at solve ingest):

  • geofence_entry — the visit's badge entered a geofence feature.
  • geofence_exit — the visit's badge left a geofence feature; also flips the sticky flags.geofence_breach on the visit and may fire a host.geofence_breach notification.

For geofence_entry / geofence_exit, the payload matches GeofenceEventPayload. First-observation is suppressed (a badge that fires its first solve already inside a zone emits no enter event).

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string

Visit id.

query Parameters
limit
integer [ 1 .. 200 ]
Default: 50

Page size. Default 50, max 200. Out of range -> 400 invalid_limit.

cursor
string

Opaque pagination cursor, bound to the active sort. Omit on the first page. A cursor minted under a different sort -> 400 cursor_sort_mismatch; malformed -> 400 invalid_cursor. Do not introspect.

type
string

Filter to a single event type (e.g. geofence_exit).

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/visits/{id}/events

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "string",
      • "visit_id": "string",
      • "type": "string",
      • "actor_id": "string",
      • "actor_type": "string",
      • "payload": {
        • "geofence_id": "string",
        • "geofence_version": 0,
        • "feature_id": "string",
        • "feature_name": "string",
        • "rating": "string",
        • "properties": { },
        • "device_id": "string",
        • "floor_id": "string",
        • "building_id": "string"
        },
      • "occurred_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "cursor": "string",
    • "sort": "-updated_at,id",
    • "limit": 50,
    • "total_count": 0
    }
}

List a visit's raw tracking solves

Keyset-paginated raw position solves for the visit's device (audit / forensics). Solve shape is PROVISIONAL — to be tightened against the tracking model. For map rendering use /tracking/trace instead.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string

Visit id.

query Parameters
limit
integer [ 1 .. 200 ]
Default: 50

Page size. Default 50, max 200. Out of range -> 400 invalid_limit.

cursor
string

Opaque pagination cursor, bound to the active sort. Omit on the first page. A cursor minted under a different sort -> 400 cursor_sort_mismatch; malformed -> 400 invalid_cursor. Do not introspect.

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/visits/{id}/tracking

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • { }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "cursor": "string",
    • "sort": "-updated_at,id",
    • "limit": 50,
    • "total_count": 0
    }
}

Get a decimated tracking trace for map rendering

Server-decimated polyline of the visit's path, sized for map rendering. Response shape is PROVISIONAL — to be tightened against the trace model.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string

Visit id.

query Parameters
target_points
integer

Desired number of points after server-side decimation.

agg
string
Enum: "median" "mean"

Aggregation used when collapsing points.

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/visits/{id}/tracking/trace

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": { }
}

Host Contacts

Host-contact directory reads and suggestions. Hosts are attached (and created via dedupe-guarded upsert) inline on visitor / visit / check-in requests.

List host contacts

Keyset-paginated org host-contact directory (front_desk+). Rows return phone_masked only — unmasked phone is on the detail endpoint.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
path Parameters
orgID
required
string

Organization id.

query Parameters
limit
integer [ 1 .. 200 ]
Default: 50

Page size. Default 50, max 200. Out of range -> 400 invalid_limit.

cursor
string

Opaque pagination cursor, bound to the active sort. Omit on the first page. A cursor minted under a different sort -> 400 cursor_sort_mismatch; malformed -> 400 invalid_cursor. Do not introspect.

sort
string

col for ASC, -col for DESC. The id ASC tie-breaker is appended server-side; clients must not include it. Unknown column -> 400 invalid_sort.

include_count
string
Enum: "1" "approximate"

Opt in to meta.total_count. 1 returns the exact COUNT(*). approximate is reserved and currently -> 400 count_approximate_not_implemented.

q
string

Name or email prefix search.

phone_e164
string

E.164 prefix match.

notify_via
string
Enum: "email" "sms" "both"
notify_on_check_in
boolean
sms_consent_status
string
sms_opted_out
boolean
email_unsubscribed
boolean
has_user_link
boolean

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/orgs/{orgID}/host-contacts

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "string",
      • "organization_id": "string",
      • "user_id": "string",
      • "name": "string",
      • "first_name": "string",
      • "last_name": "string",
      • "email": "user@example.com",
      • "phone_masked": "string",
      • "company": "string",
      • "notify_via": "email",
      • "notify_on_check_in": true,
      • "sms_consent_status": "string",
      • "sms_consent_state": "never_consented",
      • "sms_opted_out": true,
      • "email_unsubscribed": true,
      • "last_notified_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "last_error": "string",
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "cursor": "string",
    • "sort": "-updated_at,id",
    • "limit": 50,
    • "total_count": 0
    },
  • "links": {
    • "self": "string"
    }
}

Suggest hosts for visit creation

Two-tier host suggestions (visitor's prior hosts + location hosts), PII masked. front_desk+; gated by the host_contact_suggest_enabled org setting.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
path Parameters
orgID
required
string

Organization id.

query Parameters
q
string

Optional search term to bias suggestions.

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/orgs/{orgID}/host-contacts/suggest

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": {
    • "visitor_hosts": [
      • {
        • "id": "string",
        • "name": "string",
        • "email_masked": "string",
        • "phone_masked": "string",
        • "company": "string",
        • "last_visit": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
        • "visit_count": 0
        }
      ],
    • "location_hosts": [
      • {
        • "id": "string",
        • "name": "string",
        • "email_masked": "string",
        • "phone_masked": "string",
        • "company": "string",
        • "last_visit": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
        • "visit_count": 0
        }
      ]
    }
}

Get a host contact

Full detail incl. unmasked phone_e164 (front_desk+). Cross-org access returns 404 (anti-leak).

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
path Parameters
orgID
required
string

Organization id.

hostContactID
required
string

Host contact id.

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/orgs/{orgID}/host-contacts/{hostContactID}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": {
    • "id": "string",
    • "organization_id": "string",
    • "user_id": "string",
    • "name": "string",
    • "first_name": "string",
    • "last_name": "string",
    • "email": "user@example.com",
    • "phone": "string",
    • "phone_e164": "string",
    • "company": "string",
    • "company_address": "string",
    • "company_logo_media_id": "string",
    • "notify_via": "email",
    • "notify_on_check_in": true,
    • "sms_consent_status": "string",
    • "sms_consent_state": "never_consented",
    • "sms_consent_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "sms_consent_method": "string",
    • "sms_disclosure_version": "string",
    • "sms_opted_out": true,
    • "email_unsubscribed": true,
    • "suppressed_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "last_notified_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "last_error": "string",
    • "last_provider_id": "string",
    • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    }
}

Notifications

User notifications — list, SSE stream, and read-state.

List notifications

Keyset-paginated notifications for the authenticated user in an org. since_id (forward polling) is mutually exclusive with cursor.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
query Parameters
org_id
string

Org to scope to.

limit
integer [ 1 .. 200 ]
Default: 50

Page size. Default 50, max 200. Out of range -> 400 invalid_limit.

cursor
string

Opaque pagination cursor, bound to the active sort. Omit on the first page. A cursor minted under a different sort -> 400 cursor_sort_mismatch; malformed -> 400 invalid_cursor. Do not introspect.

include_count
string
Enum: "1" "approximate"

Opt in to meta.total_count. 1 returns the exact COUNT(*). approximate is reserved and currently -> 400 count_approximate_not_implemented.

type
string
severity
string
Enum: "info" "success" "warning" "error"
unread
boolean
since_id
string

Return notifications newer than this id (forward polling). Not combinable with cursor.

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/notifications

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "string",
      • "org_id": "string",
      • "user_id": "string",
      • "type": "string",
      • "severity": "info",
      • "title": "string",
      • "body": "string",
      • "action_label": "string",
      • "action_url": "string",
      • "visitor_id": "string",
      • "visit_id": "string",
      • "status": "string",
      • "meta": { },
      • "payload": { },
      • "read_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "cursor": "string",
    • "sort": "-updated_at,id",
    • "limit": 50,
    • "total_count": 0
    }
}

Mint a notification stream ticket

Mint a short-lived ticket for the SSE stream (the EventSource API can't send Authorization headers, so the stream authenticates via this ticket).

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
Request Body schema: application/json
required
org_id
required
string

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/notifications/stream-ticket

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "org_id": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": {
    • "ticket": "string",
    • "expires_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "stream_url": "string"
    }
}

Stream notifications (SSE)

Server-Sent Events stream of live notifications. Authenticates via a ticket query param (from the stream-ticket endpoint) rather than a bearer header.

query Parameters
ticket
required
string

Stream ticket from POST /v1/notifications/stream-ticket.

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/notifications/stream

Response samples

  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "title": "Unauthorized",
  • "status": 401,
  • "detail": "Authentication required.",
  • "code": "UNAUTHORIZED"
}

Mark a notification read

Mark a single notification as read for the calling user.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string

Notification id.

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/notifications/{id}/read

Response samples

  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "title": "Unauthorized",
  • "status": 401,
  • "detail": "Authentication required.",
  • "code": "UNAUTHORIZED"
}

Mark notifications read (bulk)

Mark a batch of notifications as read for the calling user.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
Request Body schema: application/json
required
ids
required
Array of strings

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/notifications/read

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "ids": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

Response samples

  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "title": "Bad Request",
  • "status": 400,
  • "detail": "Unknown sort column: foo",
  • "code": "invalid_sort"
}

Metrics

Operational dashboard metrics and timeseries (response shapes provisional).

Aggregate dashboard metrics

Aggregate metrics for an org/scope, selected by presets. Response is a per-preset object whose shape is modelled provisionally here (large and preset-dependent) and will be frozen before build start.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
query Parameters
org_id
required
string
location_id
string
division_id
string
building_id
string
presets
string

Comma-separated: visitors, tracking, devices, ops (badges_devices deprecated).

tz
string

IANA timezone for day-bucketed aggregates.

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/metrics

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": { }
}

Check-in worker counters

In-process check-in worker counters (per-process, not persisted). Response shape modelled PROVISIONALLY.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
query Parameters
org_id
required
string
location_id
string

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/metrics/checkin-ops

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": { }
}

Historical metric timeseries

Historical aggregated buckets for a metric over [from, to). Response shape modelled provisionally and will be frozen before build start. Use exclude_live to drop the current partial bucket.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
query Parameters
org_id
required
string
metric
required
string
from
string <date-time>
to
string <date-time>
location_id
string
building_id
string
division_id
string
tz
string
exclude_live
boolean

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/metrics/timeseries

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": { }
}

Live metric timeseries tail

Live tail of a metric's buckets, polling forward from after. Response shape modelled provisionally and will be frozen before build start.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
query Parameters
org_id
required
string
metric
required
string
after
string <date-time>
location_id
string
building_id
string
division_id
string
tz
string

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/metrics/timeseries/live

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": { }
}

Badge Swipes

RFID reader scan records (read + CSV export).

List badge swipes

Keyset-paginated RFID reader swipe records for an org (front_desk+). Rows are ingest-time snapshots. Times use the half-open [swiped_after, swiped_before) convention.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
path Parameters
orgID
required
string

Organization id.

query Parameters
limit
integer [ 1 .. 200 ]
Default: 50

Page size. Default 50, max 200. Out of range -> 400 invalid_limit.

cursor
string

Opaque pagination cursor, bound to the active sort. Omit on the first page. A cursor minted under a different sort -> 400 cursor_sort_mismatch; malformed -> 400 invalid_cursor. Do not introspect.

sort
string

col for ASC, -col for DESC. The id ASC tie-breaker is appended server-side; clients must not include it. Unknown column -> 400 invalid_sort.

include_count
string
Enum: "1" "approximate"

Opt in to meta.total_count. 1 returns the exact COUNT(*). approximate is reserved and currently -> 400 count_approximate_not_implemented.

reader_device_id
string
badge_device_id
string
division_id
string
location_id
string
building_id
string
zone_id
string
rfid
string
status
string
visitor_id
string
swiped_after
string <date-time>
swiped_before
string <date-time>

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/orgs/{orgID}/badge-swipes

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "string",
      • "organization_id": "string",
      • "status": "string",
      • "server_time": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "device_time": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "reader_device_id": "string",
      • "reader_mac": "string",
      • "reader_serial": "string",
      • "reader_label": "string",
      • "division_id": "string",
      • "location_id": "string",
      • "building_id": "string",
      • "zone_id": "string",
      • "rfid": "string",
      • "badge_device_id": "string",
      • "visit_id": "string",
      • "visitor_id": "string",
      • "visitor_first": "string",
      • "visitor_last": "string",
      • "visitor_email": "string",
      • "visitor_phone": "string",
      • "visitor_company": "string",
      • "meta": { },
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "cursor": "string",
    • "sort": "-updated_at,id",
    • "limit": 50,
    • "total_count": 0
    },
  • "links": {
    • "self": "string"
    }
}

Export badge swipes as CSV

CSV export with the same filters as the list endpoint (location_admin+). Bounded by a 50k row cap; the applied cap is echoed in the X-Row-Cap header.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
path Parameters
orgID
required
string

Organization id.

query Parameters
reader_device_id
string
badge_device_id
string
division_id
string
location_id
string
building_id
string
zone_id
string
rfid
string
status
string
visitor_id
string
swiped_after
string <date-time>
swiped_before
string <date-time>

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/orgs/{orgID}/badge-swipes/export.csv

Response samples

  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "title": "Unauthorized",
  • "status": 401,
  • "detail": "Authentication required.",
  • "code": "UNAUTHORIZED"
}

Mapping

Floors, geofences, routes, route versions, waypoints, calibration sessions, fingerprints, radio-map publish/status, and live/historical tracking.

Floors/zones for an org.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
path Parameters
orgID
required
string

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/orgs/{orgID}/floors

  • 404
Content type
application/json
{

      • "version": 0,
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ]
}

cognitoBearer
path Parameters
orgID
required

id

}

The floor's geofence. Returns 204 (with X-Resource-Status) when none is configured.

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
path Parameters
orgID
required
string
floorID
required
string

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/orgs/{orgID}/floors/{floorID}/geofence

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": {
    • "id": "string",
    • "org_id": "string",
    • "floor_id": "string",
    • "geojson": { },
    • "status": "string",
    • "version": 0,
    • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    }
}

Upsert a floor's geofence

Create or replace the floor's geofence (GeoJSON).

Authorizations:
cognitoBearer
path Parameters
orgID
required
string
floorID
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
required
object

GeoJSON FeatureCollection. Each Feature requires a stable string id (numeric IDs rejected) and a Polygon/MultiPolygon geometry. Recognized per-feature properties (all optional, extra keys tolerated): name, active (bool, default true), rating (severity hint; informational<low<medium<high<critical), notify_on_breach (bool, default true), priority (reserved), and breach_on (enter|exit|both, default exit) — which boundary crossing counts as a breach. An invalid breach_on is rejected (400 INVALID_GEOJSON).

status
string

active | inactive (default active).

Responses

Production

https://api.safepass.com/v1/orgs/{orgID}/floors/{floorID}/geofence

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "geojson": { },
  • "status": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": {
    • "id": "string",
    • "org_id": "string",
    • "floor_id": "string",
    • "geojson": { },
    • "status": "string",
    • "version": 0,
    • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    }
}

}

cognitoBearer
path Parameters
orgID
required
string
floorID
required
string
routeID
required
string
waypointID
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
latitude
required
number
longitude
required
number
required
object
csi_b64
string
csi_sample_count
integer
csi_min
integer
csi_max
integer
device_id
string
captured_at
string <date-time>

Bulk-capture fingerprints

cognitoBearer
path Parameters
orgID
required
string
floorID
required
string
routeID
required
string
waypointID
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
required
Array of objects (FingerprintCreateRequest)

string

  • 401

  • 404

application/json
{ }
